heading: Omitted
label: 174 Omitted
notes: CodificationSection was from the Department of Agriculture Appropriation Act, 1946, , , provided for the disposition of proceeds from the sale of guayule and other rubber-bearing plants, and was not repeated in subsequent appropriation acts. Similar provisions were contained in prior appropriation acts as follows:act July 5, 1945, ch. 271, title I59 Stat. 423, .May 5, 1945, ch. 10959 Stat. 152, .June 28, 1944, ch. 29658 Stat. 447, .July 12, 1943, ch. 21557 Stat. 415, title I, .July 2, 1942, ch. 47656 Stat. 597, title III, .Apr. 28, 1942, ch. 24756 Stat. 240
